title: Chewy vs GetPawsy Cat Trees for Large Cats – Honest Comparison
seoTitle: Chewy vs GetPawsy Cat Trees – Which Is Better? (2026)
metaDescription: Comparing Chewy and GetPawsy cat trees for large cats: curation quality, weight ratings, pricing, and which actually stocks heavy-duty models.
tags: best place to buy cat tree
author: GetPawsy Pet Care Team

sections.heading: Why This Comparison Matters
sections.content: Chewy is the largest online pet retailer. They stock hundreds of cat trees — but finding ones that actually support large cats requires sorting through pages of standard-weight models. GetPawsy curates specifically for quality, with every cat tree in our large-cat collection verified for 25+ lb weight ratings.

sections.heading: Selection & Curation
sections.content:
Chewy: 500+ cat trees. Wide selection, but most are standard-weight models (under 15 lb rating). Heavy-duty options exist but require careful filtering.

GetPawsy: Curated collection focused on large-cat-verified trees. Every product in our large cat tree collection is rated for 25+ lbs.

If you know exactly what you need, Chewy's volume works. If you want confidence that every option is suitable for your large cat, GetPawsy's curation saves research time.

sections.heading: Price Comparison
sections.content: Prices are comparable for similar quality. Chewy's autoship discounts (5%) help on consumables but rarely apply to furniture. Both offer free shipping on qualifying orders. GetPawsy's 30-day satisfaction guarantee matches Chewy's return policy.

sections.heading: The Verdict
sections.content:
For large cats specifically, GetPawsy's curated approach means less browsing and more confidence. Every tree in our collection has been verified for weight, stability, and construction quality. Chewy is excellent for general pet supplies, but their cat tree selection requires more research to find large-cat-appropriate options.

Browse: curated cat trees for large cats

faq.question: Does Chewy sell heavy duty cat trees?
faq.answer: Yes, but they're mixed in with hundreds of standard models. You'll need to filter by brand and check weight ratings carefully. Many trees labeled 'large' are only rated for 15 lbs.

faq.question: Is GetPawsy cheaper than Chewy for cat trees?
faq.answer: Prices are similar for comparable quality. GetPawsy's advantage is curation — every large-cat tree is verified for 25+ lb support, saving you the research time of filtering Chewy's massive catalog.
